pref.ue_project_path.desc: Select the root directory of your Unreal Engine project
op.copy_assets.label: Setup Unreal Project
op.copy_assets.desc: Copy required assets to Unreal project
pref.guide.title: Usage Guide:
pref.guide.step1: 1. Select the root directory of your Unreal Engine project.
pref.guide.step2: 2. Click 'Setup Unreal Project' to copy required files into your UE project. UE 5.5+ is required.
pref.guide.step3: 3. In UE editor, locate UBIO\EUW_UBIO and run it to open the import/export UI.
pref.guide.step4: 4. In Blender, open the right-side N panel > UBIO.
